- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/dispatcher.rs`: `run_deterministic`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs`: `run_workspace_command`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs`: `persist_runner_artifacts`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs`: `load_task`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs`: `load_task_artifacts`

**Notes:**
- The free function `run_deterministic` (lines 259–274 of `dispatcher.rs`) is distinct from the trait method definition; it takes `host: &dyn V2RuntimeHost` and calls `host.run_deterministic(...)` directly.
